Name: EquipmentLineupParam
Description: Determines the appearance of equipment in the shop menu.

Fields.Name: Part ID
Fields.Description: The part to add to the Parts menu.

Fields.Name: Purchase Cost
Fields.Description: The purchase cost of the part in the Parts Menu.

Fields.Name: Unlock Flag
Fields.Description: The event flag required for this part to appear in the Parts menu.

Fields.Name: Part Category
Fields.Description: The category this part appears under in the Parts menu.

Fields.Name: Is Achievement Target
Fields.Description: Is part of the condition for the 'Obtain All Parts' achivement.

Fields.Name: Reward Condition
Fields.Description: The reward condition to unlock this part with. Used for log hunter and mission rewards.
